issues.title: No 'Top 3' summary for quick executive review
issues.description: An executive wants to know 'What are the top 3 crimes?' at a glance. The bar chart requires reading all bars.
reproduction_steps: Try to identify top 3 crimes quickly
issues.expected: A 'Top 3' callout at the top of the page
issues.actual: No summary; full bar chart required

summary: Crime Types page is clear but lacks executive-level summary.
